# 4Culture Grant Application Automation CLI

## Overview
CLI and SDK for automating 4Culture grant applications. Uses Playwright for browser automation and supports MCP (Model Context Protocol). Features: workflow automation, data extraction from documents, AI narrative generation (OpenAI), grant database (SQLite), multiple output formats (JSON, YAML).

## Documentation
- Main: README.md
- Quick start: docs/quick-start.md
- Usage: docs/usage-examples.md
- SDK: docs/sdk.md
- MCP: docs/mcp/setup-guide.md

## Usage
- Install: pip install -e . && playwright install chromium
- Run: python -m grant_automation_cli --help
- Auth: python -m grant_automation_cli auth login
